daily.today_energy: Your intuition is hitting different today, Cancer. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower right now. Channel that introspective energy into something creative or meaningful rather than scrolling endlessly.
daily.love: There's a softness in the air around your connections. Whether you're single or coupled up, lean into vulnerability today. Real talk and genuine moments are where the magic lives. Don't overthink the small stuff.
daily.career: Your work energy feels collaborative and inspired. This is a solid day to pitch ideas, reach out to someone you've been meaning to connect with, or tackle something you've been putting off. Your effort compounds.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Move in ways that feel good—yoga, a walk, stretching—rather than grinding hard. Your nervous system will thank you. Hydrate and maybe journal out any feels that need processing.

weekly.overview: This week you're in your restoration era, Cancer. The cosmos is giving soft energy—time to tend to what matters most and release what's been weighing on your heart. Trust the quiet moments.
weekly.love: Someone's paying attention to the little things you do. Whether single or coupled, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Let people see the real you, messy and all. Connection deepens when masks come off.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that creative solution brewing in your mind—share it when you feel ready. Small wins compound. Focus on progress over perfection and watch momentum build.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Move in ways that feel good, not obligatory. Rest isn't laziness—it's part of your power-up sequence. Hydrate, journal, do whatever helps you feel grounded and present.
